Support for the IDN (I/O dynamic network). More...


Functions

static __inline void tmc_idn_send_buffer (DynamicHeader dest, uint32_t tag, const void *buf, uint32_t words)
 Send a packet of words on the IDN.
static __inline void tmc_idn0_receive_buffer (void *buf, uint32_t words)
 Receive a packet of words from idn demux 0.
static __inline void tmc_idn1_receive_buffer (void *buf, uint32_t words)
 Receive a packet of words from idn demux 1.

 Send a packet of 1 word.

static __inline unsigned long tmc_idn0_receive (void)
 Receive a word from IDN demux queue 0.
static __inline unsigned long tmc_idn1_receive (void)
 Receive a word from IDN demux queue 1.

Detailed Description

Support for the IDN (I/O dynamic network).
